'''鈭歾-dh-n-r''' ('''kazadhneroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbreathe|outbreathe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbreathe|outbreathe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-dh-n-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhneroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhneroko|thizadhneroko]] || [[word:jizadhneroko|jizadhneroko]] || [[word:shizadhneroko|shizadhneroko]] || [[word:kizadhneroko|kizadhneroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhneroko|thuthuzadhneroko]] || [[word:jujuzadhneroko|jujuzadhneroko]] || [[word:shushuzadhneroko|shushuzadhneroko]] || [[word:kukuzadhneroko|kukuzadhneroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhneroko|thozadhneroko]] || [[word:jozadhneroko|jozadhneroko]] || [[word:shozadhneroko|shozadhneroko]] || [[word:kozadhneroko|kozadhneroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zadhneroko|th忙zadhneroko]] || [[word:j忙zadhneroko|j忙zadhneroko]] || [[word:sh忙zadhneroko|sh忙zadhneroko]] || [[word:k忙zadhneroko|k忙zadhneroko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhneroko|thazadhneroko]] || [[word:jazadhneroko|jazadhneroko]] || [[word:shazadhneroko|shazadhneroko]] || [[word:kazadhneroko|kazadhneroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
